case_title: EZEKIAL WOO VS. FRANCISCO DUARTE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, EZEKIAL AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-05-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-02-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-20-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, EZEKIAL SERVED JUL-14-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, FRANCISCO

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-02-2009. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-03-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. DEC-05-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN LEON BOOS.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-15-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE FEB-13-2009.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-19-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-03-2009 - CASE SETTLED AT CONFERENCE. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON MAY-19-2009 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ARBITRATOR ESTA SCHWARTZ SWIG APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-17-2009 THROUGH MAY-18-2009.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DUARTE, FRANCISCO
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-15-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT CCP 664.6 - ENTIRE ACTION FILED
